hero.headline: The Operating System for Indonesian B2B Commerce
hero.subheadline: Unify procurement, sales, inventory, and local tax compliance (e-Faktur) into a single precision platform built for Indonesian enterprises.

features.headline: Everything your supply chain needs, nothing it doesn't

erp.title: B2B ERP & Inventory
erp.desc: Multi-warehouse stock control, purchase orders, and goods receipts with absolute precision.

crm.title: CRM & Sales Pipeline
crm.desc: Track leads, quotes, and client relationships from first contact to final payment.

finance.title: Invoicing & e-Faktur
finance.desc: Generate invoices, manage AR/AP, and automate Indonesian tax reporting effortlessly.

hrd.title: HR & Attendance
hrd.desc: Employee management, payroll, and attendance tracking aligned with Indonesian labor law.

philosophy.title: Core Philosophy
philosophy.quote: Connecting every purchase, warehouse, and tax report with absolute precision. We build operating systems for Indonesian B2B commerce.
philosophy.description: IndoSupplier streamlines your B2B commerce operations. Automate localized invoice creation, connect multi-warehouse stock allocations, and sync with local e-Faktur compliance standards out-of-the-box.

waitlist.headline: Be first when we launch
waitlist.subheadline: Join 200+ businesses already on the list. Early members get 30% off their first year and dedicated onboarding.
